question: Where is the luggage carousel located in the image? Select from the following options: (A) On the right side. (B) On the left side. (C) In the middle. (D) It cannot be determined from the given information..
answer_choices: It cannot be determined from the given information

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A clearly visible luggage carousel with rotating belt and bags, positioned on the right side.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: No luggage carousel, no bags, no conveyor belt, no indication of baggage claim area.
